# Clout

> Clout is a wholesale Non-QM mortgage lender and direct-to-investor lender, licensed in NY, NJ, PA, FL, CT, TX. NMLS #65328. Headquartered at 70 Charles Lindbergh Blvd, Suite 200, Uniondale, NY 11553. Phone 844-477-3111. Email PowerUp@CLOUTwmb.com. A division of Cliffco Mortgage Bankers (founded 1989).

## Mission

Clout is the wholesale Non-QM channel and direct-to-investor lender for mortgage brokers and real estate investors who need approvals when conforming lenders say no. Our edge is speed of close, program flexibility, and parent-Cliffco's three-decade Non-QM expertise.

## Products

- [DSCR Loan](https://cloutwmb.com/loan-options/dscr/) — For real estate investors qualifying on rental cash flow — no W-2s, no tax returns.
- [Bank Statement Loan](https://cloutwmb.com/loan-options/bank-statement/) — For self-employed borrowers qualifying on 12 or 24 months of business or personal bank statements.
- [1099 Only Mortgage](https://cloutwmb.com/loan-options/1099-only/) — For independent contractors and gig workers — qualify on gross 1099 income, not net Schedule C.
- [Foreign National Mortgage](https://cloutwmb.com/loan-options/foreign-national/) — For non-US citizens investing in US real estate — qualify without a US SSN or credit history.
- [Asset Qualifier Loan](https://cloutwmb.com/loan-options/asset-qualifier/) — For high-net-worth borrowers qualifying on liquid assets instead of W-2 income.
- [Non-Agency Second Home](https://cloutwmb.com/loan-options/non-agency-second-home/) — For vacation and second-home buyers — flexible underwriting outside conforming guidelines.
- [P&L Only Loan](https://cloutwmb.com/loan-options/pl-only/) — For business owners qualifying on a CPA-prepared profit and loss statement.
- [Lite Documentation Loan](https://cloutwmb.com/loan-options/lite-doc/) — For W-2 employees with limited documentation.
- [Written VOE Only](https://cloutwmb.com/loan-options/wvoe/) — Qualify with an employer-completed VOE form — no pay stubs, no tax returns.
- [Full Documentation Non-QM](https://cloutwmb.com/loan-options/full-doc/) — For borrowers with full documentation who need Non-QM for reasons other than income.

## Audience

Clout serves two parallel audiences:
- Mortgage brokers (wholesale partner channel)
- Real estate investors (direct-to-investor channel)

## States

NY, NJ, PA, FL, CT, TX

## Compliance

- NMLS Consumer Access: https://www.nmlsconsumeraccess.org/EntityDetails.aspx/COMPANY/65328
- Equal Housing Lender
- Licensed by: NY State Department of Financial Services, NJ Department of Banking and Insurance, PA Department of Banking and Securities, FL Office of Financial Regulation, CT Department of Banking, TX Department of Savings and Mortgage Lending / OCCC

- [Real Estate Investors](https://cloutwmb.com/investors/)
